channel.title: socat on IT notes
channel.description: Recent content in socat on IT notes

item.title: Bypass AllowTcpForwarding
item.description: To bypass AllowTcpForwarding no try using socat and nc: socat TCP-LISTEN:<local port>,reuseaddr,fork "EXEC:ssh <server> nc localhost <remote port>" For example from your desktop run: socat TCP-LISTEN:8080,reuseaddr,fork "EXEC:ssh 1.2.3.4 nc 10.0.0.1 3000" This will listen on local port 8080 connect via ssh to 1.2.3.4 and use nc to connect 10.0.1.1:3000

item.title: redis over TLS
item.description: Using socat: brew install socat Create the tunnel: socat -v TCP-LISTEN:6379,fork,reuseaddr ssl:your.redis.example.com:6379 Use redis-cli as usual
